purpose: Register additional real-data source targets without promoting them to validation claims before materialization, checksum, metric output, baseline comparison and claim boundary.
claim_boundary: Source registration is not scientific validation. No superiority claim unless real-data metrics pass predefined thresholds under reproducible commands and complete provenance.

promotion_requirements: download official files from primary source
record sha256 for each local file
cross-check data-vector and covariance semantics against official Pantheon+/CosmoSIS likelihood
run docs/panteon_likelihood.py with optimizer diagnostics
write non-overwriting run artifact with manifest

rows.primary_source: DESI DR2 BAO official publication and collaboration data products
promotion_requirements: confirm exact official table/covariance provenance
verify local table and covariance ordering
record checksum for table and covariance
document observable semantics: DM/rd, DH/rd, DV/rd or equivalent
run joint likelihood with LCDM, wCDM, CPL and RLL under identical optimizer settings
claim_blocked: high DESI/RLL compatibility without quantitative mapping

rows.primary_source: DESI DR2 Ly-alpha and extended BAO literature context
promotion_requirements: locate primary collaboration data product, not only secondary analysis
materialize official measurement and covariance if used
separate literature context from chi2-ready dataset
claim_blocked: secondary literature context used as direct data
Ly-alpha context promoted to validation without primary measurement/covariance

rows.primary_source: Union3.1 / host-property corrected supernova compilation literature
promotion_requirements: locate official data release or machine-readable table
record source version and checksum
compare against Pantheon+ and DES/Dovekie as separate supernova routes
never merge supernova compilations without dataset label and covariance policy
claim_blocked: Union3.1 used as committed dataset before official materialization
SN compilation differences ignored in DESI-era model comparison

promotion_requirements: locate official DES/Dovekie data product if publicly released
record photometric-calibration version
treat calibration as a systematic branch, not a replacement for Pantheon+ without audit
claim_blocked: Dovekie cited as direct validation data without materialized files

rows.primary_source: Planck 2018 official products / Planck Legacy Archive
promotion_requirements: declare whether using compressed shift prior, official likelihood, chain, or bibliographic comparison
record exact Planck product and version
record covariance or prior covariance if compressed
keep CMB-shift claims limited until likelihood/prior semantics are explicit
claim_blocked: Planck number used without version/likelihood/prior semantics
CMB validates RLL without explicit covariance
